steps.t: The crate of Ranger supplies can be found in Echad Taerdim. You should collect the supplies to take to the Rangers in Cirith Ungol.
Rangers of Ithilien can be found in the western cliffs of Cirith Ungol. You should deliver supplies to any Rangers you find. Mírthel said there were f…
Mírthel can be found in Echad Taerdim, the Ranger camp in Cirith Ungol. You should talk to Mírthel.
